resources.string: Click to view button functions and features
• START / STOP (Green/Red): Starts or stops video recording. Recording runs in the background even if the screen is off or you are using another app (e.g., navigation).
• SAVE (Purple/Orange): Protects the current video fragment from deletion. The file will be moved from the temporary folder to the \'Saved\' folder. Use this button to keep important road events.
• GALLERY (Blue): Allows quick preview and management of recorded videos.
• SETTINGS (Gray): Opens the settings menu to adjust resolution, quality, audio, and storage limits.
• EXIT (Red): Closes the application and stops all background processes.
• Speed: Displayed in the top-right corner of the screen (requires GPS).
• GPS Status: Indicates the quality of the connection with satellites. Green color means precise location.
• Recording Time: Shows the current duration of the active video file.

The app automatically deletes the oldest files from the temporary folder after a set period (default 7 days) or when space limits are reached to make room for new recordings. Files in the \'Saved\' folder are never automatically deleted.
